title: CLASHPOINT
description: The official modpack for CLASHPOINT- a public Factions server created by StrikeTV.
body:
![CLASHPOINT's logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7fe4ea8c17f687c8060d2d6e5bf8d74849bd35b.png)
The official modpack for the server CLASHPOINT-- so we can update your mods for you.

CLASHPOINT is a public factions server created by the YouTuber StrikeTV. With custom weapons, economy, claims, and weekly auctions-- come pave your own path in the CLASHPOINT.

We update everything here between each patch, so you don't need to worry about watching our Discord constantly! Although... maybe you should join the Discord.

**THIS IS THE UNOPTiMIZED VERSION!** You can get the full optimized version in our Discord.
